Description: Unique random identifier for each bike object.
the initial version is 1 and is increased on every update of the data object. In case of a version conflict (when the client's object version is behind) the backend increas the version +2.
Unix timestamp of last modification in ms.
Value 'true' when the item was deleted. This information is needed in order to synchronize a delete request accross all customer devices.
Describes the category of the data item (always 'CloudBike').
SHA256 hash of either the longVin (A-Kombi) or the shortVin (B-Kombi or LIN).
Unique identifier of a motorbike. LongVin (17-digits) or ShortVin (7-digits). The longVin is the preferrable option.
SHA256 hash of the 17-digits VIN.
Geoposition latitude of the location when the bike was disconnected from the BMW Motorrad Connected App.
Geoposition longitude of the location when the bike was disconnected from the BMW Motorrad Connected App.
SHA256 hash of the 7-digits VIN.
Bike model identifier code.
Default value is the model name. Can be changed to an individual name by the customer.
B-Kombi vehicle type ID (1:1 relationship to the typeKey).
Fuel level in percentage.
Used charging mode. Only possible value is 'ChargingMode_DcHvCharging'.
Battery state in percent for electric bikes.
Remaining range with current battery state for electric bikes.
Remaining charging time in minutes for electric bikes.
Last time the motorbike was connected via bluetooth.
Unix timestamp in seconds when map was activated for the next 6 month interval. If not activation happens in 6 month the access to the app / navigation will be blocked untill bike was connect again.
Unix timestamp in seconds of next service due date from the bike.
Remaining distance until the next required service check from the bike in meters.
Tire pressure front wheel from the bike in bar.
Tire pressure back wheel from the bike in bar.
Total mileage in meters.
Trip1 mileage from the bike in meters.
Color Code of the bike.
Remaining fuel range from the bike in meters.
Total mileage driven connected with the App in meters.
Total time driven connected with the App in seconds.
